title: schizachyrium gracile var. firmius
intro: Schizachyrium gracile var. firmius, also known as little bluestem, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Schizachyrium gracile var. firmius include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Schizachyrium gracile var. firmius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, or used in topical creams and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
